stemHtml: At a higher gross mass on a piston-engined aeroplane, in order to maintain a given angle of attack, configuration and altitude…

options.a: the airspeed must be decreased and the drag will increase.
options.b: the airspeed must be increased and the drag will remain unchanged.
options.c: the airspeed must be increased and the drag will also increase.
options.d: the lift/drag ratio must be increased.
